ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this is a Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary, that the will is not self-proving, read the attestation clause and received it into evidence pursuant to Probate Code 8221(b)(1). The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary (order for the same signed in open Court). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
